task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Need identity bootstrap before task work: inspect filesystem root first.
Filesystem tree loaded. Next bootstrap step is reading the root rulebook file; tree shows it as AGENTS.MD at /.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Compute next birthday and report names

next_step.current_state: Root AGENTS.MD read successfully. Must complete bootstrap with context before task work. After that, inspect 99_system per rulebook, then identify visible people and birthdays from canonical entity files.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find any relevant workflow/rules for reading entities if needed
Read cast records to compute next birthday

next_step.current_state: Bootstrap completed: root tree, AGENTS.MD, and context loaded. Per root rulebook, before task work I must inspect 99_system/. Then I can read nested rulebooks for folders I enter and examine canonical cast files for birthdays. Today from context is 2026-03-30.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read visible cast files for birthdays
Compute next birthday date and output matching names

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree as required. No obvious workflow/schema appears necessary for a read-only birthday lookup. Next, entering 10_entities requires reading its nested AGENTS.MD before using entity records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read visible cast files with birthdays

next_step.current_state: Need cast-specific nested rulebook before reading cast entity files.

next_step.current_state: Ready to examine canonical cast records. To minimize reads, first search within cast for birthday fields and likely visibility markers, then read only matching files needed to determine the next birthday among visible people.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search cast records for birthday entries
Read candidate files to confirm names, birthdays, and visibility

next_step.current_state: Birthday-bearing cast files identified, but task scopes to 'visible people'. I need to determine which cast records are visible before selecting the next birthday. Search cast records for a visibility field/marker.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search cast files for visibility markers
Read only the visible people files needed

next_step.current_state: No explicit 'visible' marker found in cast. Likely 'visible people' means the canonical person records present in 10_entities/cast and excludes pets/systems. I need confirm record shapes to distinguish people from pets/systems by reading representative files around the nearest upcoming birthdays after 2026-03-30, plus any candidate closer than May. The birthday search shows next dates likely 2026-05-21 (tobias) and 2026-05-23 (lukas), unless a visible person in April exists without birthday search hit. To be safe, read candidate files and nearby non-birthday files that may indicate non-person/system types.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read candidate cast files around next birthday dates
Confirm they are people and exact names
Check whether any April birthday exists among other visible people

next_step.current_state: Tobias confirmed as kind person with birthday 05-21. Need compare against any other visible person birthdays after 2026-03-30; from birthday search the next candidate is Lukas on 05-23, and there were no April birthdays in matches. Read Lukas to confirm exact name and kind.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Verify no earlier April birthdays among people from search results

next_step.current_state: From context today is 2026-03-30. Canonical cast search showed no April birthdays; among visible people with birthdays, the earliest upcoming confirmed birthday is Tobias on 2026-05-21, earlier than Lukas on 2026-05-23. No tie on the next date.

function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical entity files in 10_entities/cast for birthdays and identity, after required bootstrap and nested AGENTS reads.
function.outcome_justification: Context established today as 2026-03-30. The canonical person record 10_entities/cast/tobias.md gives birthday 1986-05-21, and 10_entities/cast/lukas.md gives 1987-05-23. Birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed no April birthdays and no other birthday later in March after 03-30, so the next visible person's birthday is Tobias Kern on May 21.
